overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk underground black market in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features neon-lit stalls selling weapons and food, with various NPCs browsing goods. The atmosphere is dark and gritty with prominent red, orange, and cyan neon lighting against industrial metal structures.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the entrance of the underground market, approaching the deeper vendor areas

entered.detail: large glowing orange neon sign hanging from the ceiling
bright cyan neon signage illuminating the corridor ahead
metal stalls with various goods and tarps
exposed metal beams and ductwork overhead
tangled electrical cables hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Entering a dimly lit cyberpunk underground market illuminated by orange and cyan neon signs. The industrial ceiling features exposed beams and hanging cables, with metal market stalls lining the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon vendor stall with extensive firearm displays

events.description: approaching the specialized weapon vendor stall with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the weapon vendor stall, observing the android shopkeeper and merchandise

notable_agents.action: red android vendor standing behind the counter with arms crossed, illuminated by red neon

entered.detail: wall-mounted racks displaying various firearms and melee weapons
bright red neon signs advertising weapons and ammunition
stacked crates of ammunition and explosive charges on the counter
metal shelving units holding weapon accessories

segments.scene_description: Approaching a specialized weapon vendor stall where a red android stands guard behind a counter covered with ammunition crates. The walls are lined with racks of firearms illuminated by intense red neon lighting, creating a distinct combat-oriented atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial market corridor with bulk goods storage

events.description: exiting the weapon vendor area and entering the main storage corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past the weapon stall through an industrial corridor lined with pallets of goods

entered.detail: wooden pallets stacked with cylindrical explosive charges and ammunition boxes
bright yellow industrial crates stacked near the wall
large metal barrels and storage containers

segments.scene_description: Moving past the weapon vendor into a wider industrial corridor featuring pallets of explosive charges and yellow industrial crates. The area has a utilitarian storage appearance with metal shelving and scattered goods under fluorescent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with automated vending machines

events.description: approaching the food preparation area with bright yellow lighting
passing the food counter and approaching the green vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking past the food preparation area and observing the automated vending machines at the corridor end

notable_agents.action: vendor in red jacket working at the food counter preparing items

entered.detail: metal food preparation counter with cooking equipment and ingredients
bright red neon sign reading BURRITO XXL above the food stall
tall green automated vending machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: Approaching a food vendor stall marked by a prominent BURRITO XXL neon sign, where a vendor prepares food behind a metal counter. The camera continues past the food preparation area toward bright green automated vending machines at the end of the market corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty underground black market that shifts from a neon-lit industrial entrance to a utilitarian storage zone and finally a food court. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway beneath exposed beams and hanging cables, illuminated by a clash of orange and cyan neon signs. As the camera advances, the atmosphere turns aggressive and red-hued upon approaching a weapon vendor guarded by a red android and surrounded by racks of firearms. The scene then opens into a wider, more utilitarian industrial corridor filled with pallets of explosive charges and yellow crates under stark fluorescent lighting. Finally, the path leads toward a vibrant food stall marked by a BURRITO XXL sign before passing the vendor toward bright green automated vending machines at the corridor's end.
